Pakistan plans 2-hour daily power cuts as Iran war drives up energy costs
description: Pakistan is implementing two-hour evening power cuts due to soaring energy costs and Iran war-related disruptions. Reduced hydropower and reliance on expensive fossil fuels are straining the nation's finances. While urban areas face shorter outages, rural regions, particularly under MEPCO, are experiencing severe, prolonged blackouts, with gas supply to power plants also significantly impacted.

'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 28: Ranveer Singh film marches toward Rs. 1100 crore milestone
description: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is redefining box office history with every passing day. Directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, Arjun Rampal, R. Madhavan, Rakesh Bedi and Sara Arjun, the espionage thriller has become the first Hindi film ever to cross Rs. 1,000 crore in India net collections. On day 28, the film is chasing the Rs. 1,100 crore domestic milestone with a live India net of Rs. 1,096.19 crore and a worldwide gross of Rs. 1,727.93 crore.

Meta CEO Zuckerberg's new working desk: Guess who he is sitting next to
description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg has physically moved his desk into the company's AI lab, where he now sits alongside Superintelligence Labs head Alexandr Wang and codes for up to ten hours a week. Meta President Dina Powell McCormick confirmed the move, adding that Zuckerberg feels he needs to understand AI "at that level" to build the strongest possible model. It signals how seriously he is taking Meta's bid to compete with OpenAI and Google in the generative AI race.

title: Alopecia Areata remedies: Home remedies to reverse bald spot in women
description: Discover natural remedies for female hair loss, from coconut oil massages to onion juice and aloe vera. The article emphasizes addressing underlying causes like stress and diet, while also advising against damaging hair practices. Patience and consistency are key, with results typically appearing within weeks.

title: Jeff Bezos' ex-wife MacKenzie donates $70 million to Meals on Wheels after selling Amazon stake
Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 & other devices get a price hike in US: Check out new prices
description: Samsung has implemented price hikes across a wide range of its mobile devices in the US, affecting smartphones and virtually its entire tablet lineup.  While some smartphone increases target high-storage configurations, all Samsung tablets have seen price jumps, even entry-level models. This strategic shift likely reflects changing supply chain costs and a focus on higher-margin products.

title: Travis Kelce’s ring for Taylor Swift sparks rare antique diamond jewelry trend
description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have reignited interest in antique diamonds, shifting focus from flawless, mass-produced stones to rare, character-rich pieces. Their engagement spotlighted vintage craftsmanship, sustainability, and uniqueness. Jewellers report rising demand, though high-quality antique diamonds remain scarce and costly. As buyers seek meaning over perfection, these historic stones are becoming prized choices, blending romance, heritage, and individuality in modern engagement trends.
